productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Printed White Tshirts
description: Composition White round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get the world to realize how terrible it looks when it frowns and spread the cheer in style with this white graphic t-shirt from united colors of benetton. The short sleeves sit snug on well toned arms, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this tee with jeans and sports shoes for a cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
